response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior generalist with strong full-stack and systems-adjacent background, including low-latency DLang work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic and GIS/geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map. However, the role centers on modern C++ (or Rust) for routing data pipelines, and the resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure a decade ago at National Instruments and no Rust. No direct routing/tiling or navigation guidance experience either. Worth a screening call to gauge C++ depth and willingness to ramp, but not a strong on-paper match.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS background through GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic
Senior tenure across diverse stacks shows adaptability
concerns: Minimal recent modern C++; no Rust experience listed
No navigation guidance or routing-tile pipeline experience
Primary stack is JS/TS/DLang, not the role's core technologies
